pr.title: refactor(kotlin): prune unused wrappers and consolidate per-package files
pr.body:
## Summary

Comprehensive Kotlin-side refactor — kills dead code that only existed to wrap Rust JNI calls (none of which were reachable from the rest of the codebase), then collapses tiny single-class files into per-package units so the module structure is easier to navigate.

**Deletions (only-self-referenced code):**
- `rust/NativeIk.kt`, `rust/NativeMesh.kt`, `rust/NativeStats.kt`, `rust/NativeSoftbody.kt` — wrappers around JNI functions that no caller used
- `anim/MorphAccumulator.kt` — internal-only utility, no callers
- `physics/Softbody.kt` — `SoftbodyBase`/`ClothSimulation`/`HairStrand`/`HairSimulation`/`SoftbodyManager` had no external users
- `live2d/L2dKeyframe.kt`, `L2dSmoothing.kt`, `L2dMask.kt`, `L2dNetSync.kt` — wrappers around `BlazeNative.l2d*` helpers no caller used
- `L2dHeader` + `parseMoc3Header` in `L2dParser.kt` — unused
- `ModelFormat` enum in `ModelApi.kt` — never referenced
- `TASK_UNLOAD` / `TASK_REFRESH` / `TASK_PERSIST` constants in `BlazeExtras.kt` — never referenced

**`BlazeNative` cleanup:** 101 → 65 external declarations. Removed every `@JvmStatic external fun` whose only callers were the wrappers above (ikSolve*, mesh{Tangents,Optimize,Dedup,Lod,Batch}, softbody*, nativeStats, plus loadFile/version/l2dRuntimeDrawableCount).

**Consolidations (no behavior change, identical class FQNs):**
- `math/` 5 files → `Math.kt` (Vec3, Vec4, Quat, Mat4, AABB)
- `material/` 3 files → `Material.kt` (TexType, TexInfo, UVTransform, EmbeddedTex, all KHR ext records, Material)
- `api/` 3 files → `ModelApi.kt` (ModelFeature, ModelSupport, ModelFormats, ResourceIndex, ModelPackage, ModelFormatRegistry, BuiltinFormats, RustBackedFormat)
- `core/` 8 files → `Scene.kt` + `BonePose.kt` + `AnimClip.kt` (large classes kept separate)
- `client/` 3 files → `ClientRuntime.kt` (ClientInit, Blaze3dRuntime, MemoryPressureMonitor)
- `async/` 2 files → `AsyncRuntime.kt`
- `vehicle/` 5 files → `VehicleSystem.kt`
- `physics/` 3 files → `PhysicsWorld.kt` + `PhysicsBinding.kt`
- `anim/` 3 files → `Animator.kt` + `StateMachineDsl.kt`
- `render/npr/` 5 files → `NprState.kt` + `RampLut.kt` + `SdfFace.kt`

All imports across the source tree continue to resolve — grep verified no remaining references to any deleted symbol.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Bazel build still produces `blaze3d-model-1.0.0.jar` (`bazel build //:blaze3d-model`)
- [ ] In-game smoke test: model loading (gltf/fbx/obj/mmd/ysm) still works, render, animation, vehicle hook still functional
- [ ] Confirm Fabric entrypoint `cn.chen.blaze3d.client.ClientInit` is still discovered (class moved into `ClientRuntime.kt` but FQN preserved)
- [ ] Confirm no native crash from removed JNI declarations — the Rust side still exports those symbols, only the Kotlin bindings were dropped

### Notes
- Behavior is intentionally identical. This is purely shape/size cleanup so subsequent feature work has less noise to wade through.
- File renames are reported as renames by git where possible (`PhysicsShape.kt` → `PhysicsWorld.kt`, `RenderWorker.kt` → `AsyncRuntime.kt`, `MemoryPressureMonitor.kt` → `ClientRuntime.kt`).


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/a13f303ef9f645a7bcf8b8da875cb534
Requested by: @cn-chen-git
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
